response.reasoning: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with approximately 20 years of progressive software engineering (July 2006 to June 2026) and holds a BS in Computer Science from MIT, satisfying the minimum qualifications. His current role at re:cinq includes work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, representing exposure to AI tooling. However, this Principal Engineer role is specifically positioned as 'Specialized Software (AI Strategy)' with core requirements for 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' His AI experience consists of approximately 1 year of infrastructure tooling work without evidence of shipping recognized AI products, building AI-powered platforms, or demonstrating strategic AI expertise. While his resume shows strong technical generalism and some entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective), the fundamental requirement—deep, demonstrated AI expertise—is absent. His career trajectory shows senior engineer progression but lacks the director-level individual contributor positioning and AI specialization this role demands.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 20 years of consistent software engineering experience across multiple domains
MIT Computer Science degree demonstrates foundational technical rigor and meets education minimum
Proven ability to architect and build complex systems (GISCollective platform, CI/CD infrastructure, real-time services handling millions of requests)
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-focused work (MCP frameworks) with no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized expertise in AI as required
Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI-related field; no research background or strategic AI knowledge
Career shows strong senior engineer trajectory but lacks the director-level IC positioning and AI specialization expected for this strategic role

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI products or recognized expertise
Very recent entry into AI space (1 year) vs. deep strategic AI knowledge required

response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly capable software engineer with strong experience and MIT education, this role specifically requires director-level expertise in AI strategy with demonstrated products and platforms built with AI. His current AI exposure is limited to infrastructure tooling added within the past year, lacking the 'recognized expertise' and AI product-building experience the role demands. For a position advising strategic customers on 'cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies' at director level, the gap in demonstrated AI expertise and strategic knowledge is disqualifying. He would be a stronger fit for senior infrastructure or general engineering leadership roles.
